questions.question: A builder needs to mix $3 \cdot 10^3$ kg of cement with $2 \cdot 10^3$ kg of sand. What is the unit rate of cement to sand?
A recipe for making cookies requires $2 \frac{1}{4}$ cups of flour to make $3 \frac{1}{2}$ dozen cookies. How many cups of flour are needed to make $5$ dozen cookies?
The cost of $5$ meters of wire is $$12$. What is the cost per meter of wire?
A construction worker can lay $6$ bricks in $2$ minutes. How many bricks can the worker lay in $5$ minutes?
A chef needs to cook $2 \frac{1}{2}$ kg of rice for $8$ people. How much rice is needed for $5$ people?
The distance between two buildings is $240$ meters. If a person walks at a rate of $4$ meters per second, how many seconds will it take to walk between the two buildings?
A group of workers can build $2$ houses in $6$ months. How many houses can they build in $9$ months?
A car travels $250$ miles in $5$ hours. How many miles will it travel in $7$ hours?

A bakery sells a total of $250$ loaves of bread per day. They sell a combination of whole wheat and white bread. The ratio of whole wheat to white bread is $3:5$. If the bakery makes a profit of $$0.50$ per loaf of whole wheat bread and $$0.75$ per loaf of white bread, how much profit does the bakery make in a day?

A construction company is building a skyscraper that requires $15,000$ cubic meters of concrete. The company has two concrete mixers that can produce $200$ cubic meters of concrete per hour. However, the mixers can only be used for $8$ hours per day due to noise restrictions. How many days will it take to produce the required amount of concrete?

teacher_rules: Always read the questions carefully before answering
Use a calculator to check your answers
Show all work and explain your reasoning
